candidate_check.description: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must not have the rsh-server package installed.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the rsh-server package is installed with the following command: 
 
$ dpkg -l | grep rsh-server 
 
If the rsh-server package is installed, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Configure Ubuntu 24.04 LTS to disable nonessential capabilities by removing the rsh-server package from the system with the following command: 
 
$ sudo apt remove rsh-server
title: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must not have the rsh-server package installed.
